name: @mikthatguy/opencode-evict
description: Refresh OpenCode's local model cache with live provider data

scripts.build:releases: bun build src/index.ts --compile --minify --outfile releases/oc-evict --target=bun-linux-x64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --minify --outfile releases/oc-evict-windows.exe --target=bun-windows-x64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --minify --outfile releases/oc-evict-darwin-arm64 --target=bun-darwin-arm64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --minify --outfile releases/oc-evict-darwin-x64 --target=bun-darwin-x64

author: OpenCode
